hooks.command: CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command') && echo "$CMD" | grep -qEi '(rm\s+(-\w*r\w*\s+)*-\w*f|rm\s+(-\w*f\w*\s+)*-\w*r|rm\s+-\w*rf|rm\s+-\w*fr|rm\s+--recursive|rm\s+--force|git\s+push\s+.*(-f|--force)\b|git\s+reset\s+--hard|git\s+clean\s+-[fdx]|git\s+checkout\s+\.$|git\s+restore\s+\.$|chmod\s+-R\s+777|mkfs\.|dd\s+(if|of)=)' && echo "Blocked: destructive command detected: $CMD" >&2 && exit 2 || exit 0

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty') && echo "$FILE" | grep -qEi '(\.env$|\.env\.|credentials|secrets|\.pem$|\.key$|id_rsa($|[^.])|\.git/)' && echo "Blocked: $FILE is a protected file" >&2 && exit 2 || exit 0
